items.title: Australia’s millionaire factory is closed for business - SMH.com.au
items.commentary: Australia has closed its significant investor visa program, which allowed wealthy individuals to gain residency through large investments. Applicants seeking to migrate through investment pathways will now need to consider alternative visa options, as this route is no longer available.
items.commentary_pt: A Austrália encerrou o programa de visto para grandes investidores, que permitia a pessoas ricas obter residência por meio de investimentos elevados. Quem pretendia migrar por essa via agora precisará buscar outras opções de visto, já que esse caminho deixou de existir.

items.title: Australia’s ‘unfair’ visa price hikes: what are they, why have they gone up, and why does it matter? - The Guardian
items.commentary: Several Australian visa application fees have increased, drawing criticism over affordability and value. The higher costs affect a wide range of applicants, including students, workers, partners, and those seeking permanent residency, adding to the financial burden of migrating to or remaining in Australia.
items.commentary_pt: Diversas taxas de solicitação de visto na Austrália aumentaram, gerando críticas sobre custo e justiça. Os valores mais altos afetam vários tipos de solicitantes, incluindo estudantes, trabalhadores, parceiros e quem busca residência permanente, elevando o peso financeiro de migrar para o país ou permanecer nele.

items.title: 'You've got no choice': The $1,475 fee leaving some in Australia feeling 'captive' - SBS
items.commentary: A $1,475 visa fee is leaving some applicants feeling trapped, with limited alternatives once they begin the process. The high cost creates pressure for those who must renew or extend their visas to maintain lawful status in Australia.
items.commentary_pt: Uma taxa de visto de US$ 1.475 está deixando alguns solicitantes com a sensação de estarem presos, com poucas alternativas depois de iniciado o processo. O custo elevado pressiona quem precisa renovar ou estender o visto para manter a situação regular na Austrália.

items.title: Family allowed into Australia to care for slain woman’s children after commissioner’s intervention - SMH.com.au
items.commentary: Family members were granted entry to Australia to care for the children of a woman who was killed, following intervention by a commissioner. The case shows how discretionary powers can allow entry in exceptional humanitarian circumstances outside standard visa processing.
items.commentary_pt: Familiares receberam autorização para entrar na Austrália e cuidar dos filhos de uma mulher assassinada, após intervenção de uma autoridade competente. O caso mostra como poderes discricionários podem permitir a entrada em situações humanitárias excepcionais, fora do processamento padrão de vistos.

items.title: Court told former MP knew lying was 'part and parcel' of visa scheme - ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.commentary: A court heard that a former member of parliament was aware that dishonesty was involved in a visa scheme. The case highlights ongoing scrutiny of fraud within visa programs and the legal consequences for those involved.
items.commentary_pt: Um tribunal ouviu que um ex-parlamentar sabia que havia desonestidade envolvida em um esquema de vistos. O caso reforça a fiscalização contínua sobre fraudes em programas de visto e as consequências legais para os envolvidos.

items.title: From student to partner visas: Australian visa application fees increased from July 2026 - SBS
items.commentary: Australian visa application fees rose across multiple categories from July 2026, including student and partner visas. Applicants across these categories will pay more to lodge their applications, increasing the overall cost of migrating to or staying in Australia.
items.commentary_pt: As taxas de solicitação de visto na Austrália aumentaram em várias categorias a partir de julho de 2026, incluindo vistos de estudante e de parceiro. Os solicitantes dessas categorias pagarão mais para dar entrada nos pedidos, elevando o custo total de migrar para o país ou permanecer nele.

items.title: 'Robbing people using visas': Applicants shocked by sudden price hike - ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.commentary: Visa applicants expressed shock at a sudden increase in application fees across various categories. The abrupt price rise affects people already planning their applications, requiring them to budget for higher costs to obtain or renew Australian visas.
items.commentary_pt: Solicitantes de visto ficaram surpresos com o aumento repentino das taxas em diversas categorias. A alta abrupta afeta quem já estava planejando seus pedidos, obrigando essas pessoas a reservar mais dinheiro para obter ou renovar vistos australianos.

items.title: From student and TR visas to partner and PR: Australian visa fees hikes across most categories - SBS
items.commentary: Australian visa fees increased across most categories, from student and temporary residence visas to partner and permanent residency applications. The broad rise means nearly all applicants will face higher upfront costs when applying for Australian visas.
items.commentary_pt: As taxas de visto na Austrália aumentaram na maioria das categorias, indo de vistos de estudante e residência temporária até pedidos de parceiro e residência permanente. O aumento amplo significa que quase todos os solicitantes enfrentarão custos iniciais mais altos ao pedir um visto australiano.

items.title: New financial year and migration: 'Focus on complying with your visa conditions' - SBS
items.commentary: With the start of the new financial year, authorities emphasised the importance of complying with visa conditions. Visa holders are reminded to follow their obligations carefully to avoid breaches that could jeopardise their legal status in Australia.
items.commentary_pt: Com o início do novo ano fiscal, as autoridades destacaram a importância de cumprir as condições do visto. Os portadores de visto são lembrados de seguir suas obrigações com atenção para evitar infrações que possam comprometer sua situação regular na Austrália.

items.title: ‘New normal’: Migration levels dip but remain higher than pre-COVID years - SMH.com.au
items.commentary: Australian migration levels have declined but remain higher than in the years before the COVID-19 pandemic, described as a 'new normal'. The trend reflects government efforts to manage overall migration numbers, which can influence future visa policy and availability.
items.commentary_pt: Os níveis de migração na Austrália caíram, mas continuam mais altos do que nos anos anteriores à pandemia de COVID-19, situação descrita como um 'novo normal'. A tendência reflete os esforços do governo para controlar o total de imigrantes, o que pode influenciar futuras políticas e a disponibilidade de vistos.

items.title: Migration dips as Coalition accuses government of failing to meet targets - ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.commentary: Migration figures dropped while the opposition accused the government of failing to meet its stated targets. The debate over migration numbers may shape future adjustments to visa programs and overall intake levels.
items.commentary_pt: Os números de migração caíram, enquanto a oposição acusou o governo de não cumprir as metas anunciadas. O debate sobre os níveis de imigração pode influenciar futuros ajustes nos programas de visto e no total de admissões.
